task_description: Comprehensive deep bug hunt across the entire MK OS codebase. Fix all real bugs including: truncated files, duplicate symbol definitions, memory safety issues, ODR violations, uninitialized data, and logic errors.

verification.summary: make clean && make all succeeds with 0 errors. Review feedback addressed: CoW destructor now uses refCount-based freeing, mk_exit serializes via mutex, usedMemory subtraction removed from destructor, sourceName unused-param warning fixed.
